slots.skin_concern: Dryness, dehydration, maintaining the skin's moisture barrier, sensitive skin

products.name: Gentle Hydrating Face Cleanser
products.description: A mild gel-based cleanser that removes impurities without stripping moisture. Ideal for daily use on normal to dry, sensitive skin.
products.how_to_use: Use twice daily on damp face, gently massage in circular motions for 30 seconds, then rinse with lukewarm water.

products.name: Barrier Comfort Face Moisturiser
products.description: A cushiony moisturiser that wraps skin in long-lasting comfort. Ideal for compromised and dryness-prone skin.
products.how_to_use: Apply morning and night after serums, using upward strokes over face and neck.

products.name: Hydrating Face Toner Mist
products.description: A fine facial mist that instantly refreshes and hydrates the skin. Can be used between skincare steps or over makeup.
products.how_to_use: Hold bottle 15–20 cm away and spritz evenly over face whenever skin feels tight or dull.

products.name: Gentle Enzyme Exfoliator
products.description: A non-abrasive exfoliator powered by fruit enzymes to smooth flaky patches. Designed for delicate, easily irritated skin.
products.how_to_use: Apply a thin layer on clean, dry skin once or twice a week, leave on for 5–10 minutes, then rinse off.

products.name: Gentle Facial Cleansing Foam
products.description: A very mild foaming cleanser inspired by baby skincare. Suitable for ultra-sensitive and reactive faces.
products.how_to_use: Use a small amount on wet skin, massage gently and rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water.
